audit.textareaValue: Create my Kundli. Name: Bhaumik Mehta. DOB: 22 August 1980. Time: 06:30 AM. Place: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

audit.text:
PredictaEvidence-backed guidanceAsk PredictaLibraryReportsPremiumAsk Predicta firstStart with the question on your mind.Type your real question. Predicta will create your Kundli if needed, choose the right evidence rooms, and answer in plain guidance instead of making you learn the app first.Try oneFrom my saved Kundli, is a foreign work opportunity likely soon?Will I get a better job opportunity soon?When is marriage timing getting stronger?Is foreign travel or relocation active for me?What should I focus on this month?Ask PredictaSpeak insteadNo Kundli yet? Predicta will ask for birth details one by one.Already saved a Kundli? Predicta can use it immediately.ACCOUNT REQUIREDSign in before chatting with Predicta.AI chat, saved Kundlis, reports, and Family Vault now stay attached to your private account.Your question is readyFrom my saved Kundli, is a foreign work opportunity likely soon?Predicta will keep this question ready after sign-in, so you do not have to start again.Predicta can still help without spending AI credits.Create Kundli, open chart proof, redeem a pass, or review pricing while your private AI chat waits for sign-in.Create KundliRedeem passSee pricingSign in(self.__next_f=self.__next_f||[]).push([0])self.__next_f.push([1,"1:"$Sreact.fragment"

before.text: PREDICTAHolistic astrology guidance, reports, charts, and saved kundlis.NavigateAsk PredictaVedic EvidenceKP EvidenceJaimini EvidenceNumerology EvidenceSignature EvidenceReportsLibraryAccountVedic EvidenceKundliAll ChartsTimelineRemediesHolistic AstrologyBirth TimeDecisionVedic worldVedic EvidenceApp languageEnglishहिन्दीગુજરાતીAsk PredictaEvidence roomVedic shows the main life signal.Use this room when you want the chart's direct guidance: what supports you, what is maturing, and what timing is active now.Start with the answerAsk for my main Vedic guidance now.Ask Predicta about thisOpen evidenceThe detailed room stays below when you want proof.D1, Moon, D9, D10, Chalit, dasha, gochar, yog, Dosh, Shrap, Lal Kitab, and remedies stay as proof.VEDIC WORLDYour main Vedic Predicta space.Start here when you want the main Kundli answer: what the chart is asking from you now, what supports you, what needs maturity, and what to do next.START HEREYour Vedic prediction appears after a Kundli is active.Create or select a Kundli first. Once the chart is active, Predicta will lead with the real reading instead of making you study tables.D1Lagna firstMoonMind and lived feelingD9Dharma and marriage depthD10Career deliveryChalitHouse-level realityVEDIC WORLDBuild Vedic reportChat with Vedic PredictaTurn the Vedic reading into a polished Kundli, career, marriage, wealth, remedies, or timing report.Chart rootD1 + VargaTimingDasha + GocharGuidanceRemedies + balanceWorld structureSeparate worlds, shared KundliOpenOpen chartsOpen D1, Chalit, and varga charts inside the same Vedic flow.RemediesKeep remedies, Purushartha balance, and practical next steps here.Check birth timeResolve time uncertainty before going deeper into the main chart.Build Vedic reportMove into a polished Vedic report when the reading needs structure.Vedic proofOpen evidencePrediction firstStart with charts and direct life prediction from graha and house evidence.Evidence secondPreserve charts, graha, houses, degrees

PREDICTAHolistic astrology guidance, reports, charts, and saved kundlis.NavigateAsk PredictaVedic EvidenceKP EvidenceJaimini EvidenceNumerology EvidenceSignature EvidenceReportsLibraryAccountKP worldKP EvidenceApp languageEnglishहिन्दीગુજરાતીAsk PredictaEvidence roomKP answers one exact event question.Use this room for job change, marriage timing, travel, property, money, or another specific event where timing matters.Start with the answerAsk my KP event question.Ask Predicta about thisOpen evidenceThe detailed room stays below when you want proof.Cusps, sub-lords, significators, ruling planets, dasha support, and timing triggers stay as proof.KP PREDICTAA dedicated KP precision world.KP Predicta answers one practical event or life outcome at a time. It shows the likely direction, what may delay it, timing readiness, and the next useful move before showing the proof chain.START HEREAsk the event. Get the answer before the KP proof.Choose a ready question, write your own, or pick “guide me.” Predicta will refine vague wording into a KP-friendly question, then answer with verdict, support/block, timing readiness, and one next step.Not enough proofCurrent KP answerPending until KP cusps and significators are calculated.PromiseNo KP proof exists yet.BlockuncertainTiming readinessKP worldBuild KP reportChat with KP PredictaCareer, money, marriage, and property questions get their own KP house logic.StartEvent firstCore proofCusps + sub lordsTimingRuling planets + dashaKP methodA dedicated KP precision world.OpenJudgement pathStart from the event, houses, cusp sub lord, and timing support.12 cuspsInspect the full cusp table with star and sub lords.SignificatorsSee which planets actually carry the event promise.Build KP reportMove into the KP report path when the judgement needs a formal write-up.KP proofOpen evidencePrediction firstGive the event verdict, likely direction, timing mood, and direct answer before proof.Evidence secondPreserve cusps, star lord, sub lord, sign

PREDICTAHolistic astrology guidance, reports, charts, and saved kundlis.NavigateAsk PredictaVedic EvidenceKP EvidenceJaimini EvidenceNumerology EvidenceSignature EvidenceReportsLibraryAccountJaimini worldJaimini EvidenceApp languageEnglishहिन्दीગુજરાતીAsk PredictaEvidence roomJaimini shows destiny direction and soul role.Use this room when you want life direction, visible path, career dharma, relationship mirrors, and the current destiny chapter.Start with the answerAsk about my destiny direction.Ask Predicta about thisOpen evidenceThe detailed room stays below when you want proof.Atmakaraka, Amatyakaraka, Arudha, Karakamsha, rashi drishti, and Jaimini timing stay as proof.JAIMINI PREDICTAYour destiny role is being prepared from your chartYour deeper role is waiting for verified karaka evidence. Do not accept a vague soul-purpose label until the Atmakaraka is calculated.START HEREYour soul-role answer comes before the karaka proof.Download Jaimini Report · Ask JaiminiDownload Jaimini ReportAsk JaiminiClassical soul-destiny lensSoulWorkImageNowSoul planetPendingCareer dharmaPendingVisible pathPendingLife chapterPendingTechnical EvidenceOpen evidencePrediction firstStart with soul role, visible identity, destiny pattern, and the active life chapter.Evidence secondPreserve Atmakaraka, Amatyakaraka, Darakaraka, Karakamsha, Arudha, Upapada, Jaimini aspects, and Chara Dasha after the guidance.Action and guidance thirdGive one calm next focus around soul maturity, visibility, career dharma, or relationship mirror.Safety and limits lastKeep agency and calculation readiness clear; do not overstate destiny as fixed fate.KARAKA COUNCIL PREVIEWWho is carrying the main life signals?Predicta keeps this preview light: the council is here as evidence, while the reading cards tell you what the signals are asking from you.PendingSelect a Kundli to calculate the council.Soul compassYour deeper role is waiting for verified karaka evidence.Do not accept a vague soul-purpose label until

audit.text: PREDICTAHolistic astrology guidance, reports, charts, and saved kundlis.NavigateAsk PredictaVedic EvidenceKP EvidenceJaimini EvidenceNumerology EvidenceSignature EvidenceReportsLibraryAccountReportsPremiumReportsReportsApp languageEnglishहिन्दीગુજરાતીAsk PredictaPick the report that answers your real question.How to chooseOpenChoose the school or Life Atlas lane first. Predicta keeps Vedic, KP, Jaimini, Numerology, and Signature separate, then gives prediction, evidence, timing, and guidance without turning the report into a lesson.FoundationKundli ReportUnderstand the whole chart without getting lost.You will learn the main chart direction, the strongest current timing signal, the life areas needing attention, and one practical remedy path.A clean starting point for the whole chart.Whole-chart prediction first; chart proof follows.Vedic Reports · SelectedKundli ReportYou will learn the main chart direction, the strongest current timing signal, the life areas needing attention, and one practical remedy path.Whole-chart prediction first; chart proof follows.Create a Kundli first. Your report choices are saved and will be ready when the chart is created. · FreeReport depthFreePremiumDownload your reportAsk Predicta from this reportCreate KundliCopy report summaryWhat you will learnPreview the main life signal, current timing, and one grounded direction before the report opens the full evidence.You will learn the main chart direction, the strongest current timing signal, the life areas needing attention, and one practical remedy path.Main life signalCurrent timingRemedy pathPremium addsPremium adds chart-by-chart prediction, house and planet evidence, contradictions, Mahadasha timing, classical tables, and a consolidated remedy plan.Download the Kundli report for focus charts, house evidence, Mahadasha, classical tables, Kundli Karma, and one remedy path.Recommended by PredictaComplete Vedic bundlePredicta chooses the sections needed to answer this report question first. Customize only if you want a narrower PDF.Selected18/18Birth details and calculationD1 and all divisional chartsParashari Chalit refinementKP cusp and sub-lord foundationJaimini destiny previewNume

PREDICTAHolistic astrology guidance, reports, charts, and saved kundlis.NavigateAsk PredictaVedic EvidenceKP EvidenceJaimini EvidenceNumerology EvidenceSignature EvidenceReportsLibraryAccountAccountAccountSettingsRedeem PassProfile and accessAccountApp languageEnglishहिन्दीગુજરાતીAsk PredictaPrivate access starts here.Before you redeemOpenYour pass works only with the email used when it was created. If you remember that email, sign in with it. If you are not sure, contact the Predicta admin or the person who invited you.1Use the pass email.Google sign-in or email sign-up both work. Predicta checks the email automatically.2Redeem the pass.Enter the code exactly as shared. Predicta will confirm the active pass.3Start with Kundli.Create your chart, then try chat, Gochar, reports, KP, or Jaimini.HOW TO REDEEMSign in with the pass email first.A private pass is tied to one approved email address. If you remember the email used for your pass, sign in with it. If you are not sure, contact the Predicta admin or pass creator.Use Google sign-in, or create an account with the pass email.Enter the private pass code exactly as shared.If the email does not match, Predicta will not redeem the pass.Account checkSign in to continuePredicta automatically checks your signed-in email against the pass. You never need to type your email on this page.Sign inNot signed in yetSign in to continuePlease sign in first. Use Google sign-in or create an account with the email used for your pass. If you are not sure, contact the Predicta admin or pass creator.Sign inPREDICTAQuiet exitMethodSafetyLegalFeedback© 2026 Predicta. All rights reserved.For reflection and self-understanding only. audit.menuText: प्रेडिक्टा से पूछेंवैदिककृष्णमूर्ति पद्धतिजैमिनीअंक ज्योतिषहस्ताक्षररिपोर्टप्रीमियमऐप भाषाEnglishहिन्दीગુજરાતીप्रेडिक्टा से पूछें
પ્રેડિક્ટાને પૂછોવેદિકકૃષ્ણમૂર્તિ પદ્ધતિજૈમિનીઅંક જ્યોતિષહસ્તાક્ષરરિપોર્ટપ્રીમિયમએપ ભાષાEnglishहिन्दीગુજરાતીપ્રેડિક્ટાને પૂછો
